Task.Name: Overall Project Duration - Public Storage - Delray Beach
Obtain Vertical Building Pemit By Owner
DELAY - Gopher Tortoise Relocation Permit - FWC
Additional Submittals Equipment Requested by EOR
Release Material form Sent to Schindler
Construct Building Pad - Obtain Pad Certificate
Install storm pipe and exfiltration trenches
Tie into Existing Stub as required
PBCWUD - S/S AB Hard Copy Submitted Review & Approval
Fire Line Underground w/ DDCV& FDC
W&S AB After 1st Lift - Submitted to Civil EOR
PBCWUD Review - W&S AB After 1st Lift
Site Lighting, brooks boxes,& Fixture Installation
Slab on Grade Prep and Pour with 1' of Footers
Installation of Additional Framing - South Elevation - Per RFI 21
